# Reject Codes Circuit Breaker

> New reject code 1227 for IOC (Immediate-or-Cancel) and FOK (Fill-or-Kill) orders that expire due to circuit breaker threshold breaches. Ensures clear feedback to traders when orders are rejected due to circuit breaker activation in equity, equity derivative, and currency derivative markets. Introduced in JSE Release 7.8.

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0 · **Tags:** error-handling · order-validation · circuit-breaker · release-7.8

## What this does

New reject code 1227 for IOC (Immediate-or-Cancel) and FOK (Fill-or-Kill) orders that expire due to circuit breaker threshold breaches. Ensures clear feedback to traders when orders are rejected due to circuit breaker activation in equity, equity derivative, and currency derivative markets. Introduced in JSE Release 7.8.

Specifies 3 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **order_id** *(token, required)*
- **order_type** *(select, required)*
- **reject_code** *(number, required)*
- **circuit_breaker_threshold_breached** *(boolean, required)*
- **protocol_type** *(select, required)*
- **market** *(select, required)*
- **order_status** *(select, required)*
- **reject_reason** *(select, required)*

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **0** — when order_type in ["IOC","FOK"]; circuit_breaker_threshold_breached eq true, then set reject_code = 1227. _Why: IOC/FOK order expires and reject code 1227 sent when circuit breaker threshold breached._
- **1** — when protocol_type eq "NATIVE"; reject_reason eq "CIRCUIT_BREAKER_BREACH", then emit order.rejection_sent. _Why: Native protocol users receive reject code 1227 in Execution Report Reject Code field._
- **2** — when protocol_type eq "FIX"; reject_reason eq "CIRCUIT_BREAKER_BREACH", then emit order.rejection_sent. _Why: FIX protocol users receive reject code 1227 in Tag 103 (OrdRejReason)._

## Errors it can return

- `REJECT_CODE_1227_CIRCUIT_BREAKER` — IOC/FOK order rejected: Circuit breaker threshold breached

## Connects to

- **circuit-breaker-system** *(required)*
- **order-validation** *(required)*
- **ioc-fok-orders** *(required)*
